title: tax — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for the calculation path. Off = TaxCalculator no-ops (returns 503 to consumers). Emergency-only — invoice lines will block.
Off = SyncTaxRatesFromProviderJob does not run. Rates stay at their currently-persisted values. Used during provider outages / migration windows.
Off = VerifyTaxExemptionJob does not run. Exemptions stay in pending status until manual verification. Used when the public registry cross-check endpoints are degraded.
Off = CircuitBreakerGate always allows. Every failure counts but the breaker never opens. Used to force-through calculations during provider recovery test.
Off = ReconcileProviderCalculationsJob skips. TaxCalculationDriftDetected will not fire. Used during provider migrations when drift is expected.
Off = NotifyExemptionExpiringJob does not fire. The 60/30/7-day warning cadence stops. Used during compliance module maintenance.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = TaxJar calculations skip (fail-fast with TAX_CALCULATION_PROVIDER_FAILED). Used when TaxJar is announced-degraded.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = the built-in NativeCalculator returns TAX_CALCULATION_PROVIDER_FAILED. Only flip off during native-calculator code path migrations.
Off = tax_exemptions.certificate_document_url stored in plaintext. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — certificate URLs are RESTRICTED per data-classes.json).
Off = tax_provider_configs.config stored in plaintext. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — credentials in plaintext).
